simple-sticky-phone.description: Sticky nav with phone number always visible. Clean, no animation.

centered-logo-curved-tagline.description: Logo centered with elegant curved tagline. Trustworthy, established feel.

blurred-background-gradient-text.description: Glassmorphism nav with blurred background and gradient text effects.

split-nav-emergency-badge.description: Split layout with emergency availability badge or urgent CTA.

full-bleed-gradient-overlay.description: Full viewport image with gradient overlay fading to theme color. Immersive.

full-clean-image.description: Clean full-bleed image with minimal overlay. Professional and premium.

gradient-text-dark.description: Bold gradient text on dark background. Modern, attention-grabbing.

mixed-typography.description: Serif and sans-serif combined for visual interest. Editorial feel.

split-with-form.description: Headline left, contact form right. Immediate lead capture.

stats-bar.description: Horizontal bar with key stats (years, satisfaction, availability).

services-3-card.description: 3 equal cards showing core services. Icon, title, 1-line description.

why-choose-us-professional.description: Trust-focused section with credentials, guarantees, differentiators.

process-numbered-cards.description: Numbered steps showing client process or workflow.

reviews-carousel.description: Carousel or grid of customer testimonials with star ratings.

baker-group-process.description: Visual process section with grouped steps and iconography.

contact-preference-card.description: Card showing multiple contact options (call, text, form, chat).

layered-image-card.description: Images with layered depth effect. Premium and visual.

stats-bar.description: Trust bar with years, reviews count, satisfaction percentage.

wave-shape-divider.description: Soft wave transition between sections. Friendly and approachable.

final-banner.description: Large CTA banner at bottom of page with prominent phone/button.

chat-bubble-floating.description: Floating chat bubble in bottom-right corner.

final-banner.description: Full-width banner with large CTA and phone number.

subtle-inline-banner.description: Inline banner that doesn't interrupt flow. Gentle conversion.

standard-multi-column.description: 3-4 column footer with links, contact, service areas, social.
